system.description:
What it does (SRD): Within 30 ft., the creature notices things it cannot see using nonvisual senses (hearing, vibration, echolocation, etc.). It still has the normal limits against total concealment (attack miss chance can still apply).

ThirdEra: Blindsense (30 ft.) is set on this item’s Details tab under Capability grants (vision and senses), not in Mechanical effects. The character sheet includes it with other vision and senses from items and race; it does not add numeric attack or AC bonuses by itself.
